description:
Return a list of all defined Line Item Types.
See [Filtering on List Actions](https://developers.procore.com/documentation/filtering-on-list-actions) for information on using the filtering capabilities provided by this endpoint.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the company. You must supply either a company_id or project_id.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the project. You must supply either a company_id or project_id.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Line Item Type

name.description: Name for the Line Item Type

code.description: Code for the Line Item Type
